markdown:
#  Unlock a User Account in the Company Directory 
##  Background 
Procore accounts with a lockout policy will lock a user out after three failed login attempts. To regain access, the user must reset their password, or a Admin of the Company Directory can unlock their account.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Edit** next to the user.
  3. Click **Unlock Account** to give the user three attempts to log in again.  
![Directory Account Locked Unlock Account](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c9337e342b85c84195da686ca4f9cb01/94af99d0cf61630c04ececca4fd7f4c7/directory-account-locked-unlock-account.png?fm=webp)


#####  Tip
If the user needs to reset their password, direct them to the following page: [How do I reset an unknown password?](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/login-and-account-management/tutorials/reset-an-unknown-procore-password)
## See Also
  * [Edit a User Account in the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/edit-a-user-account-in-the-company-directory)
  * [Deactivate User Accounts in the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/inactivate-a-batch-of-user-accounts-in-the-company-directory)
  * [Add Someone as an Employee of Your Company](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-someone-as-an-employee-of-your-company)
title: Unlock a User Account in the Company Directory
description: How to unlock a user account that has been locked after three failed login attempts.
